title: Better Trims
description: Adds new textures for the armor trim items
body:
---
- ### ABOUT
> **What does the pack add:**\
The pack remakes the default trim item textures to give them a better look.
>
> **Why do i download it:**\
To give your world a dynamic look.
![In-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ffa97af6364c16cf0da22c8ee1b35c7b57bf6ba.png)
---
- ### Issues/requests/Ideas
> **_X_ is not working!**\
Report it to my discord

>**Wow great pack, but I would like to....!:**\
>If you have any requests 
>suggest them in my discord, I am mostly active there

>**Omg, I just got an amazing idea!**\
suggest the idea in my discord, if you want to.

>**Using assets**\
Sorry i do not allow usage of my assets
---
- ### Requires what mod?
>It doesn't require anything Rn.
